name: io.github.gba3124/mcp
description: Webhook relay for AI agents: keyless quickstart, event inspection, replay, mock payloads.

environmentVariables.name: ANYHOOK_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Personal API key from anyhook.net/dashboard/settings/api-keys. Starts with ahk_live_. Optional: without it, the anyhook_quickstart tool can self-provision an account, or tools run against an in-memory store for local dev.

environmentVariables.name: ANYHOOK_API_BASE
environmentVariables.description: Override the API base URL. Defaults to https://anyhook.net. Used by self-hosted AnyHook installations.
